programme.title: Ceolaireacht
programme.desc: Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar Chiarraí Thuaidh sa gclár seo chun blaiseadh a fháil de cheol na háite. (Doireann Ní Ghlacáin explores North Kerry's rich musical tradition.)

programme.title: Beidh Aonach Amárach
programme.desc: Feicfear Craobh Lomadh Caorach na hÉireann ag Seó Chluain Maine sa gclár seo. (We head to the Clonmany Show to see the All-Ireland Sheep Shearing Championship.)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Iarrann Frasier comhairle ar Sam faoin gcaidreamh atá aige le Diane. (Frasier asks Sam for some advice about his more intimate relationship with Diane.)

programme.title: Cois Siúire
programme.desc: Leanfaidh an Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt lorg Annraoi Ó Liatháin fad na Siúire. (Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt follows in the footsteps of Annraoi Ó Liatháin along the River Suir.)

programme.title: The Twelve
programme.desc: Téann Colby chuig an áit inár tharla na dúnmharaithe in 1968. (Colby retraces Amanda's steps at the beach where the 1968 murders occurred.)

programme.title: An Aimsir Láithreach
programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.title: Survivor 47
programme.desc: Faigheann na hiarrthóir litreacha ón mbaile nach raibh súil ar bith acu leo. (Castaways get the biggest reward of the season with surprise letters from home.)

programme.title: Uachtaráin
programme.desc: Éamon de Valera a bhí ina Uachtarán ar Éirinn ó 1959-73 a bheidh faoi chaibidil sa gclár seo. (Éamon de Valera who was President of Ireland from 1959-73 is the focus of this episode.)

programme.title: Uachtaráin
programme.desc: Éamon de Valera a bhí ina Uachtarán ar Éirinn ó 1959-73 a bheidh faoi chaibidil sa gclár seo. (Éamon de Valera who was President of Ireland from 1959-73 is the focus of this episode.)

programme.title: Nuacht TG4
programme.desc: Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)

programme.title: Cois Siúire
programme.desc: Leanfaidh an Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt lorg Annraoi Ó Liatháin fad na Siúire. (Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt follows in the footsteps of Annraoi Ó Liatháin along the River Suir.)

programme.title: Beidh Aonach Amárach
programme.desc: Feicfear Craobh Lomadh Caorach na hÉireann ag Seó Chluain Maine sa gclár seo. (We head to the Clonmany Show to see the All-Ireland Sheep Shearing Championship.)

programme.title: Téacs Taistil
programme.desc: Is in Bratislava a chuirfidh Séaghan, Proinsias agus Louise deireadh leis an tsraith. (The gang's final stop is Bratislava, and they're going out with a bang!)

programme.title: France 24
programme.desc: Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Bréidín & Clúmh
programme.desc: Tá cuileog sa teach! Tá Clúmh ina dhiaidh agus níl tada chun é a stopadh. (There's a fly in the den! Fluff is in hot pursuit, and nothing will stand in his way.)

programme.title: Na Singalings
programme.desc: Téann Melody agus Bop chuig an margadh agus tá neart ar díol ag na stainníní éagsúla. (Melody and Bop are in the market where there are stalls selling lots of different things.)

programme.title: Tarrtháil Cois Trá le Timmy
programme.desc: Bíonn air Timmy teacht i gcabhair ar a chairde. (When Timmy's friends get in trouble by the seaside, he has to try and rescue them.)

programme.title: Abby's Amazing Adventure
programme.desc: Ag seoltóireacht a bheidh Abby agus Rudy inniu! (Abby and Rudy are sailing on the high seas today!)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Ní mór do Pip agus Posy a thaispeáint do Zac nach gá dó faitíos a bheith air roimh stoirmeacha. (Pip and Posy must show Zac that storms aren't anything to be afraid of.)

programme.title: Olobob Top
programme.desc: Tá fail ar Iasc Mór agus déanann na hOlobobanna 'Deilgneach' le cabhrú léi. (When Big Fish has hiccups the Olobobs make her Prickle, who encourages her to keep calm.)

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Caitheann Kevin am le Gekko mar nach dteastaíonn uaidh a bheith dána ar nós Howler agus Rip. (While The Wolfys run amok, Gekko doubts he has what it takes to be good.)

programme.title: Wussywat
programme.desc: Milleann Wussywat dhá cháca breithlá Oirtís agus caithfidh sí ceann nua a fháil anois. (Wussywat accidentally ruins both of Ortus' birthday cakes.)

programme.title: Zou
programme.desc: Rachaidh Zou agus a chairde ag iascaireacht inniu. Tá comórtas idir Uncail Zavier agus Zou. (Zou and his friends go fishing today.)

programme.title: Dinocity
programme.desc: Beidh Ricky ag tabhairt aire d'fhéileacán inniu. (Today, Ricky tries to look after a butterfly!)

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Tá Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex ag iarraidh an Fatadón a bhlaiseadh. (Ginger and the Pea Rex's want to lick the Potatodon.)

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: Aimsíonn Dot agus a cairde rud aisteach sa loch. (Dot and her friends come across a strange item deep in the lake.)

programme.title: Ella Bella Bingo
programme.desc: Faigheann Henry preabaire mar bhronntanas agus socraíonn Ella ceann a dhéanamh di féin. (Henry receives a Space Hopper as a present and Ella decides she will make one.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Charlie agus Lola
programme.desc: Tá Lola ag ceapadh go bhfuil an t-ádh ag rith léi, sin go dtéann chuig an bpictiúrlann le Charlie. (Lola feels extremely lucky until she and Charlie set out to go to the cinema.)

programme.title: Baile Beag Draíochtúil Pinocchio
programme.desc: Imríonn Pinocchio cleas ar na Banphrionsaí Jodelle agus Neantóg. (Pinocchio plays a trick on Princesses Jodelle and Neantóg.)

programme.title: Pat an Madra
programme.desc: Cuireann Sleamhnaí muince ghoidte i bhfolach i seanbhábóg. (Sleamhnaí hides a stolen necklace inside an old doll.)

programme.title: Angelo Rules
programme.desc: Tá Angelo ag iarraidh amhrán nua an bhanna 'Slobber' a chloisteáil. (The band Slobber have a new song and Angelo wants to hear it.)

programme.title: Dónall Dána
programme.desc: Tugann Dónall a chuid bréagán ar fad uaidh. (Dónall gives away all of his toys.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Super Simple Amhráin
programme.desc: Amhrán spraíúil faoi bheith ag oscailt agus ag dúnadh a bheidh inniu againn. (A fun song about opening and shutting.)

programme.title: Blocuimhreacha
programme.desc: Cuireann Deich roinnt Blocuimhreacha ag déanamh aclaíochta. (Ten gets some of the Numberblocks exercising.)

programme.title: Blocdhathanna
programme.desc: Tá iontas ar na Dathanna faoi na dathanna ar fad is féidir a úsáid chun Donn a dhéanamh. (The Colours are surprised to see how many Colours can make Brown.)

programme.title: Na Blociontais
programme.desc: Cabhraíonn na Blociontais le hEalaí an t-urlár rince a mhaisiú. (The Wonderblocks help Arty hop in different directions to light up the disco floor!)

programme.title: Blocuimhreacha Speisialta
programme.desc: Caithfidh na Blocuimhreacha dul sa tóir ar thaisce an Chaptaen Heicsea-Fhéasóg! (The Numberblocks must seek Captain Hexabeard's treasure.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Líonann Posy a bolg sula dtéann sí chuig teach Pip ach bíonn féasta réitithe ag Pip dóibh. (Posy fills up on snacks whilst heading to Pip's house but Pip has prepared a feast.)

programme.title: Saol Faoi Shráid
programme.desc: Bhí an-lá ag Ribín ach bhí fíor-dhrochlá ag Glibín. Céard a tharla? (Ribín had an amazing day but poor Glibín had a terrible day. How could this be?)

programme.title: Bígí ag Ceol
programme.desc: Daltaí Ghaelscoil Chluain Dolcáin a rachaidh i mbun pinn an tseachtain seo chun amhrán a chumadh faoi na séasúir. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)

programme.title: Curious George
programme.desc: Tá George cinnte go bhfuil eilifint ina pheata ag an gcomharsa thuas staighre. (George is convinced that the new upstairs neighbour has an elephant as a pet.)

programme.title: Nuair a Bheidh Mé Mór
programme.desc: Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina theagascóir aclaíochta nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as a gym instructor when he grows up.)

programme.title: Zou
programme.desc: Imreoidh Zou agus a chairde cluichí séabracha sa sneachta inniu. (Zou and his friends enjoy some zebric games in the snow today.)

programme.title: Dee Dee
programme.desc: Is é an Méara de Pfeffel a bheidh ina mholtóir ar Chomórtas na mBláthbhoscaí Fuinneoige. (Mayor de Pfeffel is going to be judging the Wonderful Window-Box Competition.)

programme.title: Ainmhithe Craiceáilte
programme.desc: Inniu feicfidh muid réabadh, grá agus ruaille buaille! (Today we'll see action, romance and plenty of drama!)

programme.title: Comhrá
programme.desc: Máire Ní Chéileachair a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín ar an gclár seo. (Máire Ní Chéileachar from Cork will be chatting to Máirtín Tom Sheáinín on this show.)

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Tagann dochtúir Hal ar mheall le linn scrúdú sláinte. (Hal's doctor finds a suspicious lump during a routine medical checkup.)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Castar mian a chroí ar Cliff ag cóisir Oíche Shamhna in Cheers. (During a Halloween party at Cheers, Cliff meets the girl of his dreams.)
